validation.min_length: This value should be no less than {{number}} characters
validation.max_length: This value should be no more than {{number}} characters
validation.min: This value should be no less than {{number}}
validation.max: This value should be no more than {{number}}

common.save_saved: Saved — the next response uses this definition.
common.waiting_request: Waiting for a request… send to port :{{port}} and it appears here.
common.resend_notify: Resend the notification with the current status (does not change data)
common.openapi_export_tip: OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec — ready for Postman. Behaviour is carried in x-behavio.
common.url_webhook_tip: Configure the simulator endpoint URLs and register notification (webhook) URLs per partner
common.copy_failed: Copy failed — copy the text on screen manually.

sim.hero_desc: Simulate SNAP BI bank endpoints — balance inquiry, transfer, virtual account, and interbank transfer. Each endpoint's response can be customised from the dashboard.
sim.empty_desc: Create your first profile to start simulating the SNAP BI bank API.
sim.no_partner: No partner yet. Add one below.
sim.name: Name
sim.va_empty: No VA yet. Use the Create VA endpoint in the left panel.
sim.va_pay_tip: Simulate a payment — the Payment Notification is sent automatically

balance-inquiry.label: Balance Inquiry
balance-inquiry.desc: Check account balance — Balance Info (service 11). Returns available, ledger, float and hold balances.

account-inquiry-internal.label: Internal Account Inquiry
account-inquiry-internal.desc: Validate an internal account number & name before transferring (service 15).

transaction-history-list.label: Transaction History List
transaction-history-list.desc: Mini statement — per-partner transaction history (service 12). Supports pagination & date range.

access-token.label: Access Token B2B
access-token.desc: Issue a B2B Bearer token — used by every other endpoint in STRICT mode.

transfer.label: Intrabank Transfer
transfer.desc: Transfer between internal accounts (service 17). The balance is really debited & credited.

transfer-interbank.label: Interbank Transfer
transfer-interbank.desc: Transfer to another bank (service 18). Source debit only — the destination account is at a different bank.

va-create.label: Virtual Account — Create
va-create.desc: Create a VA. Mark it paid from the right panel to trigger the Payment Notification.

msg.delete_body: Profile "{{name}}" (port {{port}}) will be permanently deleted along with its partners, accounts and VAs. This cannot be undone.
msg.pay_va_body: VA "{{va}}" will become PAID for {{amount}} {{currency}}, and a Payment Notification is sent automatically to the URL the partner registered. Partners without a registration receive no notification.
msg.pay_va_failed: Failed to mark the VA as paid.
msg.partner_delete_body: Partner "{{partner}}" will be deleted along with all of its accounts.

qris.hero_desc: Simulate every QRIS SNAP BI endpoint — generate, query, refund, cancel, decode, payment, apply-ott. Each endpoint can be customised from the dashboard.
qris.hero_note: Profiles here are PJP/acquirers — self-contained with their own port, partners and access token, fully separate from the profiles on the Bank Simulator page.
qris.empty_desc: A PJP profile is self-contained — the profiles on the Bank Simulator page are not used here.
qris.qr_empty: No QR yet. Use the Generate endpoint on the left.
qris.refund_cancel_hint: Use the refund/cancel curl on the left.
qris.resend_notify: Resend Payment Notify with the current status (does not change data)

access-token.label: Access Token B2B
access-token.desc: Issue this PJP's own B2B Bearer token — used by the other QRIS endpoints in STRICT mode. A bank profile's token is NOT valid here.

qris-generate.label: Generate QR
qris-generate.desc: Create a QR (dynamic/static). Customisable: reject amount ≤ 0, block merchant, simulate downtime.

qris-payment.label: Payment H2H
qris-payment.desc: Host-to-host payment — customer pays a QR.

msg.delete_body: Profile "{{name}}" (port {{port}}) will be permanently deleted along with its QRs, partners and accounts. This cannot be undone.
msg.static_needs_amount: A static QR needs an amount.
msg.pay_body: QR "{{qr}}" will become PAID for {{nominal}}, and a Payment Notify is sent automatically to the URL the partner registered. Partners without a registration receive no notification.
msg.expire_body: QR "{{qr}}" will become EXPIRED and can no longer be paid.

iso.hero_desc: Acts as a bank host over a TCP socket, not HTTP — balance inquiry, on-us & inter-bank transfer, cash withdrawal, PIN/phone change, up to reversal. Every reply can be changed via scenarios without touching code.
iso.hero_note: Its message shape is defined by the uploaded spec profile (jPOS packager XML or JSON) — DE dictionary, bitmap, framing and operation routing follow the profile, so a new host only needs its profile added. The data is fully separate from Bank Simulator and QRIS: its own iso8583 schema, accounts and port.
iso.spec_profile_tip: The spec profile used by this simulator — change it via the ⋮ menu
iso.pick_first: Select or create a simulator first.
iso.no_ops: This spec profile has no operations yet.
iso.ops_hint: Operations are determined by MTI + processing code from the spec profile — not a URL. A scenario changes what is reported; balance mutations still run as normal.
iso.saved_next_msg: Saved — the next message uses this.
iso.conn_hint: ISO-8583 has no URL — the client connects to a host:port TCP. The parameters below must match on the client side; if they differ, the entire byte stream shifts and every message fails to parse.
iso.conn_len_note: length marker in front of each message
iso.not_running_warn: The simulator is {{status}} — the port is not open. Press Start first.
iso.snippet_head: Connection test snippet (Python) — framing already matches the profile
iso.profiles_hint: A bank host spec is not public, so it is uploaded as a profile — not written in code. To add a new host, just upload its profile.
iso.xml_packager: jPOS packager XML (usually from the bank)
iso.ops_hint_field: The packager file carries no operations. Left blank = all operations from the parent profile are used; filled = this list replaces the parent's.
iso.supported_classes: Supported packager classes: {{classes}}. Anything else is rejected — misinterpretation produces broken messages on the wire.
iso.trace_hint: A host spec can't be verified from a document. Paste one hex trace from a real host — if it parses cleanly, the profile is proven; if not, the error points to the wrong DE.
iso.accounts_hint: Two different things: an account holds a balance, a card maps PAN → account. An ISO client sends the PAN in DE2, so an account without a card is still answered DE39=14 (invalid card). Accounts here are separate from the bank simulator.
iso.no_account: No account yet — create one above, or use the Seed sample data menu.
iso.no_card_tip: Without a card, a PAN-bearing transaction is answered DE39=14
iso.pin_block_tip: The last PIN block received — not the PIN, and cannot be decrypted without an HSM
iso.pin_not_set_tip: Never received a change-pin. The PIN is never verified, so transactions can still run.
iso.req_info_hint: Values for building a message to this card. The source account is looked up in order: DE102 → DE2 → DE35. Any one is enough.
iso.de4_desc: Amount — 12 digits, 2 decimals without a dot
iso.de53_desc: NEW PIN block — change-pin only. Never verified, so any value is accepted: no need to know the old PIN.
iso.de52_desc: Last stored PIN block — not the PIN, and cannot be turned back into PIN digits without an HSM
iso.de11_desc: STAN — 6 digits, unique per transaction (used by reversal)
iso.live_hint: Messages are stored as hex — you can send one straight to Test Trace while tracking down a problem.
iso.live_connected: Connected — messages appear as they arrive
iso.pc_tip: DE3 (processing code) exactly as received in the request — this is what selects which operation is chosen
iso.failed_tip: The client received no reply — open for the reason
iso.name: Name
iso.create_port_hint: ISO ports are recommended to start at 9201 — banks use 9001+, QRIS 9101+, and uniqueness is enforced in the database.
iso.legend_intro: A scenario that rejects runs before the natural logic, and that logic is skipped entirely: no balance moves, PIN/phone don't change, and no transaction is recorded — like a real host rejecting. DE54 still reports the balance that has not changed. Available for every operation in the profile, chosen from the Operations & Scenario tab.

msg.copy_failed: Copy failed — copy the text on screen manually.
msg.card_fields_required: PAN and account number are required.
msg.clear_history_body: The entire message history for {{name}} will be deleted from the database and cannot be recovered. Accounts, cards and profiles are untouched.
msg.delete_sim_body: "{{name}}" together with its accounts, cards and logs will be permanently deleted.
msg.switch_body_running: The simulator is running, so it will be restarted — any open TCP connections will drop.
msg.delete_profile_body: Profile {{profile}} v{{version}} will be deleted. Simulators pointing to it will not be able to start.
msg.def_saved: Definition saved — the next message uses this.

webhook.title: Notification URL (Webhook)
webhook.hint: Notifications are sent to the URL the partner registered — like ASPI, not via a per-request header. Partners without a registration receive no notification.
webhook.use_sink_tip: Use the built-in sink for testing
webhook.empty: No URL registered yet — notifications won't be delivered anywhere.

openapi.title: Import OpenAPI — {{name}}
openapi.hint: Every bank's paths differ, so the system only suggests operations — review before applying. Nothing changes until you press Apply.
openapi.duplicate_foot: One operation is mapped more than once — the last one wins.
openapi.export_failed_body: The spec could not be built. Check the server log.
openapi.spec_unreadable: The spec could not be read

errpage.e403_msg: You do not have permission to access the requested data.
errpage.e404_msg: This is not the web page you are looking for.
errpage.e500_msg: Just kidding, looks like we have an internal issue, please try refreshing.

dialog.sim_create_hint: A new simulator = its own "bank profile": endpoints, 8 scenarios, baseline partners & accounts are prepared automatically. You can adjust them afterwards.
dialog.sim_clone_hint: The configuration and any request/response changes you've made are copied along. Ideal for a bank that's similar but slightly different.

normal.name: Normal
normal.desc: Transaction runs normally — funds are debited & credited.

limit.name: Limit
limit.desc: Rejected when the amount is above 25 million (4031700).

bank_down.name: Bank Down
bank_down.desc: Bank is having an outage — HTTP 503, balance stays intact.

commit_then_drop.name: Commit Then Drop
commit_then_drop.desc: Funds are deducted but the response is lost — tests idempotency/reconciliation.

malformed.name: Malformed
malformed.desc: Transaction succeeds but the response body is deliberately corrupted.

async_callback.name: Async Callback
async_callback.desc: Responds PENDING first, then a success-status webhook is sent 2 seconds later.

normal.name: Normal
normal.desc: QR created successfully (2004700). Rejected only when a (dynamic) amount ≤ 0.

format_field_salah.name: Invalid Field Format
format_field_salah.desc: Field format does not match — 4004701 Invalid Field Format.

field_wajib_kosong.name: Missing Mandatory Field
field_wajib_kosong.desc: A mandatory field is empty — 4004702 Invalid Mandatory Field.

unauthorized.name: Unauthorized
unauthorized.desc: Rejected at the auth gate — 4014700 Unauthorized.

transaksi_kedaluwarsa.name: Transaction Expired
transaksi_kedaluwarsa.desc: Transaction past its validity — 4034700 Transaction Expired.

fitur_tidak_diizinkan.name: Feature Not Allowed
fitur_tidak_diizinkan.desc: Feature not active for this partner — 4034701 Feature Not Allowed.

melebihi_limit.name: Exceeds Limit
melebihi_limit.desc: Rejected when the amount is above 10 million — 4034702 Exceeds Transaction Amount Limit.

batas_aktivitas_terlampaui.name: Activity Count Limit Exceeded
batas_aktivitas_terlampaui.desc: Transaction count over the limit — 4034704 Activity Count Limit Exceeded.

do_not_honor.name: Do Not Honor
do_not_honor.desc: Rejected by the issuer without a specific reason — 4034705 Do Not Honor.

terlalu_banyak_request.name: Too Many Requests
terlalu_banyak_request.desc: Hit the rate limit — 4294700 Too Many Requests.

service_down.name: Service Down
service_down.desc: QRIS service outage — 5004701 Internal Server Error.

timeout.name: Timeout
timeout.desc: Response deliberately slow 5 seconds then 5044700 Timeout.

normal.name: Normal
normal.desc: Natural logic runs fully — balance/PIN/phone actually change when the transaction is valid, DE39=00.

saldo_tidak_cukup.name: Insufficient Balance
saldo_tidak_cukup.desc: Rejected even with sufficient balance — DE39=51. No balance moves at all.

kartu_tidak_valid.name: Invalid Card
kartu_tidak_valid.desc: PAN treated as unknown — DE39=14 Invalid Card Number.

pin_salah.name: Wrong PIN
pin_salah.desc: The only way to test a wrong PIN — the PIN block is never verified (needs an HSM). DE39=55, the PIN is not changed.

kartu_kedaluwarsa.name: Expired Card
kartu_kedaluwarsa.desc: The expiry date isn't stored by the simulator, so it's tested here — DE39=54.

rekening_tidak_ada.name: No Such Account
rekening_tidak_ada.desc: Account treated as not found — DE39=52 No Checking Account.

melebihi_limit.name: Exceeds Limit
melebihi_limit.desc: Over the transaction limit — DE39=61 Exceeds Withdrawal Limit.

transaksi_tak_diizinkan.name: Transaction Not Allowed
transaksi_tak_diizinkan.desc: Transaction type not allowed for this card — DE39=57.

format_error.name: Format Error
format_error.desc: Message treated as malformed — DE39=30 Format Error.

issuer_tidak_tersedia.name: Issuer Unavailable
issuer_tidak_tersedia.desc: Issuer cannot be reached — DE39=91 Issuer Inoperative.

timeout_delay_30s.name: Timeout (30s delay)
timeout_delay_30s.desc: The reply is correct but only sent after 30 seconds — tests client timeout.

tanpa_balasan.name: No Reply
tanpa_balasan.desc: Message received, never answered; the connection stays open — this is what triggers a reversal.

koneksi_diputus.name: Connection Dropped
koneksi_diputus.desc: Socket closed mid-transaction — the client gets an EOF, not a timeout.

balasan_rusak.name: Corrupted Reply
balasan_rusak.desc: The reply is deliberately mangled — tests client parser resilience.
